1-naive.raw_response:
## FHIR Queries: Functional/Psychogenic Seizure Diagnoses

These conditions span several overlapping clinical terms. Queries cover key SNOMED CT concepts and the primary ICD-10-CM code, with patient resources included via `_include`.

---

```
Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|230456007&_include=Condition:subject

Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|443390004&_include=Condition:subject

Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|724449005&_include=Condition:subject

Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|33380008&_include=Condition:subject

Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|F44.5&_include=Condition:subject
```

---

### Code Reference

| Query | System | Code | Description |
|-------|--------|------|-------------|
| 1 | SNOMED CT | `230456007` | Psychogenic non-epileptic seizure (PNES) |
| 2 | SNOMED CT | `443390004` | Dissociative convulsions |
| 3 | SNOMED CT | `724449005` | Functional seizure (Functional Neurological Symptom Disorder w/ seizures) |
| 4 | SNOMED CT | `33380008` | Conversion disorder (broader category) |
| 5 | ICD-10-CM | `F44.5` | Conversion disorder with seizures or convulsions |

---

### Notes
- **`F44.5`** (ICD-10-CM) is the primary administrative billing code encompassing dissociative convulsions and conversion disorder with seizures — this query will likely yield the highest volume of results in clinical systems.
- **`_include=Condition:subject`** returns associated `Patient` resources in the same bundle.
- To retrieve only **active** diagnoses, append `&clinical-status=active` to any query.
- To consolidate into a single request where supported, comma-separated OR logic can be used:
```
Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|230456007,http://snomed.info/sct|443390004,http://snomed.info/sct|724449005,http://snomed.info/sct|33380008,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|F44.5&_include=Condition:subject
```
1-naive.prompt_text: Find all patients who have been diagnosed with functional seizures, psychogenic nonepileptic seizures, dissociative convulsions, or conversion disorder presenting with seizure symptoms.

1-broad.raw_response:
## FHIR Queries: Functional/Psychogenic Seizure Disorders

These conditions span multiple terminologies (ICD-10-CM, SNOMED CT), so queries cover all relevant coding systems:

```
Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|F44.5&_include=Condition:subject

Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|443390004&_include=Condition:subject

Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|230456007&_include=Condition:subject

Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|17326005&_include=Condition:subject

Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|724386005&_include=Condition:subject
```

---

### Code Reference

| Query | Code | Display |
|---|---|---|
| ICD-10-CM | `F44.5` | Conversion disorder with seizures or convulsions *(Dissociative convulsions)* |
| SNOMED CT | `443390004` | Dissociative convulsions *(PNES)* |
| SNOMED CT | `230456007` | Psychogenic non-epileptic seizure disorder |
| SNOMED CT | `17326005` | Conversion disorder *(functional neurological symptom disorder)* |
| SNOMED CT | `724386005` | Functional seizure |

### Notes
- **`_include=Condition:subject`** pulls linked `Patient` resources in one call
- These conditions are often coded under **F44.5** (ICD-10) or **443390004** (SNOMED) in modern EHRs — prioritize those two queries
- Consider also filtering by `clinicalStatus=active` if only current diagnoses are needed (e.g., append `&clinical-status=active`)
- Terminology varies widely by institution; cross-querying all code systems is recommended for completeness
1-broad.prompt_text: Find all patients who have been diagnosed with functional seizures, psychogenic nonepileptic seizures, dissociative convulsions, or conversion disorder presenting with seizure symptoms.

1-expert.raw_response:
## FHIR Queries: Functional/Psychogenic Seizure Diagnoses

These conditions (functional seizures, PNES, dissociative convulsions, conversion disorder with seizures) are clinically equivalent and mapped across ICD-10-CM and SNOMED CT:

```
Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|F44.5&_include=Condition:patient
Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|230456007&_include=Condition:patient
Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|191940003&_include=Condition:patient
Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|724386005&_include=Condition:patient
```

**Or combined into a single query using comma-separated codes:**

```
Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|F44.5,http://snomed.info/sct|230456007,http://snomed.info/sct|191940003,http://snomed.info/sct|724386005&_include=Condition:patient
```

---

### Code Reference

| Code System | Code | Display |
|---|---|---|
| ICD-10-CM | `F44.5` | Conversion disorder with seizures or convulsions (Dissociative convulsions) |
| SNOMED CT | `230456007` | Psychogenic non-epileptic seizure (PNES) |
| SNOMED CT | `191940003` | Hysterical convulsions (Dissociative convulsions) |
| SNOMED CT | `724386005` | Functional neurological symptom disorder (Conversion disorder) |

### Notes
- `F44.5` is the primary ICD-10-CM code covering all of these clinically equivalent presentations
- `_include=Condition:patient` retrieves the linked **Patient** resources in the same Bundle
- Add `&clinical-status=active` to restrict to currently active diagnoses
- Add `&verification-status=confirmed` to exclude suspected/provisional diagnoses
1-expert.prompt_text: Find all patients who have been diagnosed with functional seizures, psychogenic nonepileptic seizures, dissociative convulsions, or conversion disorder presenting with seizure symptoms.

2-naive.raw_response:
All code systems are consistently co-coded across the same 749 records. Here's a summary of everything found before finalizing:

| Code System | Code | Display |
|---|---|---|
| SNOMED CT | `191714002` | Dissociative convulsions (disorder) — covers PNES, pseudoseizures, functional seizures |
| ICD-10-CM | `F44.5` | Conversion disorder with seizures or convulsions |
| ICD-9-CM | `300.11` | Conversion disorder (legacy) |
| ICD-9-CM | `780.39` | Other convulsions (legacy secondary code co-coded with 300.11 on this server) |

**Key findings:**
- ✅ No dedicated VSAC value set exists for PNES/functional seizures — this is expected for a narrower psychiatric-neurological concept
- ✅ SNOMED `191714002` is the canonical code, confirmed as "Dissociative convulsions (disorder)" in SNOMED March 2026 release — it covers all synonyms: pseudoseizures, functional seizures, hysterical attacks, psychogenic nonepileptic seizures
- ✅ ICD-10-CM `F44.5` is the exact modern billing code (DSM-5: "Conversion Disorder with attacks or seizures")
- ✅ All four codes co-occur on every record — combining them with OR logic ensures no records are missed from any primary coding path
- ✅ No additional SNOMED subtypes exist beyond `191714002` on this server (checked `230456007`, `192397006` — both returned 0)

---

```
Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|191714002,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|F44.5,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-9-cm|300.11,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-9-cm|780.39
```

2-broad.raw_response:
All four code systems consistently return **749 Condition records** — the populations are perfectly co-incident, confirming this server multi-codes every record. The sample validates every returned Condition carries the expected SNOMED + ICD-10-CM + ICD-9-CM codings. Here's a full summary of my findings before the final answer:

---

### 🔍 Concept Mapping Summary

| Concept | System | Code | Display |
|---|---|---|---|
| Dissociative convulsions (PNES / functional seizure) | SNOMED CT | `191714002` | Dissociative convulsions (disorder) |
| Functional seizures / conversion with convulsions | ICD-10-CM | `F44.5` | Conversion disorder with seizures or convulsions |
| Conversion disorder (legacy) | ICD-9-CM | `300.11` | Conversion disorder |
| Other convulsions (legacy secondary) | ICD-9-CM | `780.39` | Other convulsions |

**Key observations:**
- No VSAC quality-measure value set covers this niche phenotype — codes were resolved via UMLS + server sampling
- `F44.4` maps to psychogenic voice/motor disorders — **not** seizure-relevant, excluded
- ICD-9-CM `780.39` alone returns the **same** 749 (no spurious epileptic convulsions present)
- SNOMED `191714002` is the canonical single concept covering psychogenic nonepileptic seizures (PNES), functional seizures, dissociative convulsions, and conversion disorder with attacks — verified in SNOMED 2026/03 release
- All 749 resources are `encounter-diagnosis` category Conditions

---

```
Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|191714002,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|F44.5,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-9-cm|300.11,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-9-cm|780.39

```


| Code System | Code | Display |

| SNOMED CT | 443372003 | Nonepileptic seizure (disorder) |
| ICD-10-CM | F44.5 | Conversion disorder with seizures or convulsions |

> **Note:** PNES is frequently coded under **F44.5** (Conversion Disorder with seizures) in clinical settings, as there is no dedicated ICD-10 code specifically for "PNES." Running all three queries will give the most comprehensive results.

1-broad.raw_response:
## FHIR Queries: Functional Seizures / Psychogenic Non-Epileptic Seizures (PNES)

**Relevant Code Mappings:**
| Concept | System | Code |
|---|---|---|
| Conversion disorder with seizures/convulsions | ICD-10-CM | F44.5 |
| Non-epileptic attack disorder | SNOMED CT | 230456007 |
| Psychogenic seizure | SNOMED CT | 9345005 |

---

```
// ICD-10-CM — Conversion disorder with seizures or convulsions (primary PNES billing code)
Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|F44.5&_include=Condition:subject

// SNOMED CT — Non-epileptic attack disorder (NEAD / PNES umbrella term)
Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|230456007&_include=Condition:subject

// SNOMED CT — Psychogenic seizure (disorder)
Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|9345005&_include=Condition:subject

// Combined multi-code query (OR logic) with patient context
Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|F44.5,http://snomed.info/sct|230456007,http://snomed.info/sct|9345005&_include=Condition:subject&clinical-status=active,recurrence,relapse

// Reverse lookup — find Patients who have any of these Conditions
Patient?_has:Condition:patient:code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|F44.5,http://snomed.info/sct|230456007,http://snomed.info/sct|9345005
```

---

**Clinical Notes:**
- **F44.5** is the standard billing code under DSM-5's Functional Neurological Symptom Disorder (FNSD) / conversion disorder — the modern preferred terminology
- **PNES** and **NEAD (Non-Epileptic Attack Disorder)** are clinical synonyms widely used in neurology and psychiatry
- Differentiated from epilepsy by **normal ictal EEG** — consider pairing with `Observation` queries for EEG results if clinical validation is needed
- Often co-occurs with trauma/PTSD history — `Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|F43.10` may yield related cohort overlap
